license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.uquevww
title: 1x M2 medium (1L)
author: Sarah Seyffert

steps_raw.instruction: Add 1 ml 1000x Na 2 CO 3 (20 mg · L -1 )
1000x concentration: H 3 BO 3 (2.86 g · L -1 ) MnCl 2 · 4 H 2 O (1.81 g · L -1 ) ZnSO 4 · 7 H 2 O (0.222 g · L -1 ) Na 2 MoO 4 · 2 H 2 O (0.390 g · L -1 ) Co(NO 3 ) 2 · 6 H 2 O (0.049 g · L -1 )
Fill up to 1 l with MilliQ-water
The medium has to be autoclaved afterwards
Always work under sterile conditions. Recipe for 1L 1x M2 medium
Add 1ml of 1000x Fe(III) ammonium citrate (6 mg · L -1 )
Add 200 µl of 5000x CuSO 4 · 5 H 2 O (395 ng · mL -1 )
